description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
Win-CodexBar 0.38.0 ports the compatible upstream CodexBar 0.38.0 provider updates to Windows.

Highlights:
- Adds CrossModel, Qoder, and Sakana AI provider support.
- Adds Doubao Coding Plan, z.ai BigModel/team usage, and Codex monthly credit-limit handling.
- Adds refresh-on-menu-open and reset-boundary refresh behavior in the Tauri tray UI.
